## Visual Notes

- Dashboard layout uses three stacked business sections.
- Metric cards share consistent hierarchy: label, primary value, numerator/denominator, percent trend area.
- Repeated metric rhythm suggests data-driven rendering by section.
- Screenshot confirmation supports the three-section structure and repeated cards.

## Non-business UI To Ignore

- Decorative dividers or background layers, if present.
- Pure layout containers without text, repeated pattern, or interaction meaning.
